last_item: Band A scaffold (set up manually): shadcn init radix/Nova/Tailwind v4, 24 ui components in src/components/ui/, alias bug fixed, NPM_CONFIG_CACHE wired into ralph.sh.
last_result: green: typecheck, 88 web tests, build, go build. Scaffold smoke test proves @/ alias resolves. Next: band B (Layout.tsx → shadcn Sidebar shell).
notes: PURE UI/UX LOOP. The prior 57-iteration hardening track is COMPLETE and shipped as v0.6.0. This track rebuilds the web panel on shadcn/ui — see PROMPT.md + UI-RULES.md + backlog.md. Start at band A (scaffold), then B (shell), C (primitives), D (views one at a time), E (cleanup). Never touch Go/business logic — frontend only.
north_star: Every view in the indiepg panel rebuilt with shadcn/ui — clean, simple, consistent — with no hand-rolled component where a shadcn one exists, behavior identical, all tests green.
